name: test_vendor_add_service_redirects_to_login_when_not_authenticated[chromium]
description: Steps: 1) Without logging in, try to access add service page. 2) Verify redirect to login or login form visible. 3) Confirm access control works.
descriptionHtml: Steps: 1) Without logging in, try to access add service page. 2) Verify redirect to login or login form visible. 3) Confirm access control works.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: assert ('/login' in 'https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service' or False)
 +  where 'https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service' = <Page url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'>.url
 +  and   False = is_visible(timeout=5000)
 +    where is_visible = <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'> selector='internal:role=button[name="Login"i]'>.is_visible
 +      where <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'> selector='internal:role=button[name="Login"i]'> = get_by_role('button', name='Login')
 +        where get_by_role = <Page url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'>.get_by_role
statusTrace:
tests/vendor/test_vendor_service_management.py:276: in test_vendor_add_service_redirects_to_login_when_not_authenticated
    assert "/login" in page.url or page.get_by_role("button", name="Login").is_visible(timeout=5000)
E   assert ('/login' in 'https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service' or False)
E    +  where 'https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service' = <Page url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'>.url
E    +  and   False = is_visible(timeout=5000)
E    +    where is_visible = <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'> selector='internal:role=button[name="Login"i]'>.is_visible
E    +      where <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'> selector='internal:role=button[name="Login"i]'> = get_by_role('button', name='Login')
E    +        where get_by_role = <Page url='https://dev-app.helpconstruct.com/vendor/add-service'>.get_by_role

labels.value: Vendor Flow - Service Management - Access Control
